marketing.headline: Trustworthy AI bookkeeping for Sweden-first teams.
marketing.subheadline: Compliance-critical flows stay deterministic. AI guides, cites, and accelerates the review surface.
marketing.demoNotice: Demo mode is intentionally using local scaffold behavior so it is never mistaken for live accounting.

captureLane.description: Camera, paste, upload, and share land in the same queue and show where the draft was stored.

innovation.description: Voice capture, simulations, and close copilot are isolated from posting authority until they earn trust.

shell.demoBanner: Demo mode is active. Local demo data and local AI fallback are enabled intentionally.

captureSheet.title: Add business evidence
captureSheet.description: Capture starts locally first so the UI stays responsive. The result tells you whether the draft was stored persistently or only for this tab.
captureSheet.pasteHint: Paste works on the Capture page — press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V) there to capture a copied image.
captureSheet.shareHint: Use your device's share menu and pick JPX Accounting to send evidence here.

camera.label: Camera
camera.hint: Snap a receipt with the device camera

upload.label: Upload
upload.hint: Pick a PDF or image from disk

share.label: Share
share.hint: Receive from another app via PWA share

captureStatus.session: {mode} draft saved for this browser tab only.
captureStatus.memory: {mode} draft saved in temporary memory for this tab only.
captureStatus.error: {mode} draft could not be saved locally. Check browser storage permissions and try again.

today.title: Review-ready bookkeeping, shaped for the phone first.
today.description: Evidence arrives once, suggestions stay explainable, and the queue keeps the real accounting work above the fold instead of hiding it under dashboard chrome.
today.queueTitle: Keep the next accounting decision obvious.
today.queueDescription: Cards stay compact on mobile, expand on larger screens, and keep AI reasoning behind secondary disclosure until it is needed.

editSheet.title: Edit before approval
editSheet.description: Correct the account, VAT code, or amounts — approving posts the corrected lines.
editSheet.amountError: Net + VAT must equal gross (within 0.01); all three amounts are required when any of them changes.
editSheet.submitError: The edited approval could not be completed.
editSheet.appendOnlyNote: Approving posts new ledger lines with your corrections — the original evidence, suggestion, and event history stay append-only and are never rewritten.

evidence.description: Immutable file record, hash chain, and provenance.

notFound.title: Evidence not found
notFound.message: This evidence id is not present in the current workspace snapshot.

preview.title: Preview
preview.unavailable: No preview is available on this device.
preview.unavailableHint: The file was captured on another device or the storage backend does not serve previews.

fields.title: Extracted fields
fields.empty: No extracted fields yet — run extraction to populate them.

links.title: Review
links.extractLocked: This voucher is already decided — extraction stays locked so the ledger remains append-only.
links.noVoucher: No voucher is linked to this evidence yet.

shared.draftSaved: Shared content saved as a draft.
shared.promoted: {count, plural, one {Shared file promoted to ledger evidence.} other {# shared files promoted to ledger evidence.}}
shared.pendingBanner: {count, plural, one {One shared file} other {# shared files}} could not be staged into evidence. Add {count, plural, one {it} other {them}} again from Quick add.

capture.title: Add evidence, see drafts, browse the archive.
capture.description: The single home for everything you've captured — drafts in progress, freshly uploaded, fully archived.

quickAdd.title: Quick add
quickAdd.description: Each tile creates a local draft you can promote into ledger evidence.

camera.label: Camera
camera.hint: Snap a receipt with the device camera

upload.label: Upload
upload.hint: Pick a PDF or image from disk

share.label: Share
share.hint: Receive from another app via PWA share

quickAdd.pasteEmpty: No image found in the clipboard.
quickAdd.pasteUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable here — press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V) on this page instead.
quickAdd.shareHint: Open your device's share menu and choose JPX Accounting to send files here.

sieResult.imported: Imported {vouchers} vouchers from the SIE file.
sieResult.importedWithSkipped: Imported {vouchers} vouchers from the SIE file — {skipped} skipped.
sieResult.error: Could not import the SIE file.

dropzone.aria: Add evidence files by browsing or dropping them here
dropzone.title: Drop receipts or invoices here
dropzone.hint: Images and PDFs up to 16 MB — click, press Enter, or drag files in.

promotion.promoteError: Could not promote {name}. Retry from the drafts table.
promotion.rejectedType: {name} was skipped — only images and PDFs are supported.
promotion.rejectedSize: {name} was skipped — files must be 16 MB or smaller.

drafts.title: Drafts in progress
drafts.empty: No local drafts. Use Quick add above or the capture button.

archive.title: Evidence archive
archive.empty: No archived evidence yet. Promote a draft above to populate the archive.
